title: TextBox Properties
description:
TextBox Properties

Textbox Properties and Events

The following list is a summary of the Textbox control properties with brief descriptions.  Click on the property names for more details.

Property	Description

AppendText	Append text at runtime. (Only available
		 from SPEL+ programs)

BackColor	Selects the background color for the
		 object's label.

Default: Control

BorderStyle	Gets or sets the control's border style.

Default: 2 -
		 Fixed 3D

Enabled	Determines if the control is enabled
		 or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

EventTaskType	The type of task used for events.

Default: 0 -
		 Normal

Font	Selects the font for the text in the
		 control.

Default: Microsoft
		 Sans Serif, 8.25pt.

FontBold	The bold attribute for the current font
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontItalic	The italic attribute for the current
		 font (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontName	The name for the current font (Only
		 available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: Microsoft Sans Serif

FontSize	The size for the current font in points
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 8.25

ForeColor	Selects the forecolor for the control.

Default: ControlText

Height	Specifies the height of the control.

Default:

Left	Specifies
		 the left location of the control.

Default:

Multiline	Gets or sets
		 a value indicating whether this is a multiline TextBox control.

Default: 0 -
		 False

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the
		 Textbox control.

Default: TextBoxXX

PasswordChar	Used to set the character shown for
		 passwords.

Default:

ReadOnly	Gets or sets a value indicating whether
		 text in the text box is read-only.

Default: 0 -
		 False

ScrollBars	Gets or sets which scroll bars should
		 appear in a multiline TextBox control.

Default: 0 -
		 False

ShowPrint	Sets whether to display output from
		 Print statements or not.

Default: 0 - False

TabIndex	Sets the tab index for the control

Default: 0

Text	Sets the text for the Textbox control.

Default:

TextAlign	Determines alignment for the text.

Default: 1 -
		 Left

ToolTipText	Sets the text
		 for the tooltip.

Default:

Top	The top coordinate of the control in
		 pixels.

Update	Updates the display of textbox control
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Variable This is an optional

Variable	Associate
		 a SPEL global variable with a TextBox control.

Default: [None]

Visible	Sets if the
		 control is Visible or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

Width	Sets the width
		 of the Textbox control.

Default:

WordWrap	Indicates
		 whether a multiline text box control automatically wraps words
		 to the beginning of the next line when necessary.

Default: 1 -
		 True

Event	Description

Click	Executes
		 when the user clicks the control with the mouse.

KeyPress	Occurs
		 when a key is pressed.
